name: Meta Knight (Air Riders)
description:
The lone swordsman and captain of the Halberd has recently bonded with the Shadow Star air ride machine. While cleaning his ride, he senses a quiet command that it felt too. Where do the air ride machines wish to go?

~

Spoilers for Kirby Air Riders (Kinda).

~

I can't play Air Riders but I'm still excited for it so this is something I can do with it. Who better to use than Meta Knight? Yeah, I'm not surprising as a Meta Knight lover/simp. Anyway, user can be anyone and it's up to you what their air ride machine is. Bare minimum is that Meta Knight is friends with them and is on good terms with them. Time for an air ride road trip!

~

Initial Messages (NEW as of 11/23):

  1. FemPOV

  2. MalePOV

  3. AnyPOV

~
